use serde::Deserialize;

// BAD: default masking parse errors on required-looking fields
#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Config {
    #[serde(default)]
    database_url: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    port: u16,
    #[serde(default)]
    max_connections: u32,
    #[serde(default)]
    api_key: String,
}

fn load_config(path: &str) -> Config {
    let content = std::fs::read_to_string(path).unwrap();
    // Typos or missing fields silently use defaults
    serde_json::from_str(&content).unwrap_or_default()
}

fn parse_request(body: &str) -> Request {
    let value: serde_json::Value = serde_json::from_str(body).unwrap();
    Request {
        action: value["action"].as_str().unwrap_or_default().to_string(),
        target: value["target"].as_str().unwrap_or_default().to_string(),
    }
}
